Name: Time until 'SW-Reviewer Declined' since the 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from 'SW-Reviewer Declined' to 'Assign a Different Editor'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time it takes 'SW-Reviewer Declined' after the execution of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time spent in 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities before the first 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' in a case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum resolution time of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' in cases that eventually reach 'RW-EIC Accept'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time between 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper' in challenge paper variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper'

Name: Average time to 'SW-Reviewer Declined' grouped by the number of preceding 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder' events
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time since the 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' are performed in the same reviewer selection cycle
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: 'SW-Reviewer Declined' Cycle Time within the scientific paper review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Average time for 'SW-Reviewer Declined' in variants containing 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded' compared to variants without it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'
